title: Another Inscription For A Stone Erected On A Similar Occasion At The Same Place In The Following Year.
content:
Reader! behold a monument
    That asks no sigh or tear,
    Though it perpetuate the event
    Of a great burial here.
    June 1790. Anno 1791.
meaning:
William Cowper's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Another Inscription For A Stone Erected On A Similar Occasion At The Same Place In The Following Year."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
